/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/testutils-test.dir/interactivetest.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/testutils-test.dir/naming.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/testutils-test.dir/refdata_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/testutils-test.dir/testasserts_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/testutils-test.dir/xvgtest_tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/testutils-test.dir/__/unittest_main.cpp.o" -o ../../../bin/testutils-test  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../../lib/libtestutils.a ../../../lib/libtestutils.a ../../../lib/libgromacs.so.10.0.0 -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a ../../../lib/libgmock.so.1.13.0 ../../../lib/libgtest.so.1.13.0 -Wl,-rpath-link,/mnt/c/Users/enduser/Desktop/gromacs-2025.2/build/lib
